sourceSummary.oneLine: 부품 승인원 for THERMAL PAD - 3, part MC0-000049, applied to model HAD1717MC and prepared by ㈜휴켐.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supplier component approval package containing revision history, material RoHS information, process flow, inspection criteria, and inspection sheet.
keyPoints: TO is H&Abyz and FROM is ㈜휴켐.
Applied model is HAD1717MC; part name is THERMAL PAD - 3; part number is MC0-000049.
Revision history lists Rev. 0 dated 2019. 04. 23 as 최초 제정.
Material list identifies Thermal Conductive Silicon Pad from Silicon valley with SGS RoHS 성적서.
Inspection criteria reference ASTM D 5470 for thermal conductivity sampling and measurement.

entities.name: Silicon valley
entities.evidence: Thermal Conductive Silicon Pad ... Maker ... Silicon valley

concepts.name: RoHS material declaration
concepts.evidence: 종합 원재료 ROHS LIST ... 비사용 증명서 (Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE)

concepts.name: QC / 제조 공정도
concepts.evidence: QC / 제 조 공 정 도

concepts.name: 4M Change
concepts.evidence: IF 4M CHANGED,RLEASE INFORM BUYER THE CHANGED ITEMS.

evidence.claim: The document is a component approval package.
The part name is THERMAL PAD - 3 and the part number is MC0-000049.
evidence.evidenceText: 품 명 (PART NAME) : THERMAL PAD - 3 ... 도 번 (PART NO) : MC0-000049

evidence.claim: The document date shown on the cover is 2019. 04. 23.
The revision history lists Rev. 0 on 2019. 04. 23 as the initial establishment.
evidence.evidenceText: Rev. 0, 개 정 일 2019. 04. 23, 상세 개정 내역 최초 제정

evidence.claim: The raw material list includes Thermal Conductive Silicon Pad from Silicon valley with an SGS RoHS report.
evidence.evidenceText: Thermal Conductive Silicon Pad ... Silicon valley ... SGS RoHS 성적서

evidence.claim: The RoHS list concerns non-use certification for Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, and PBDE.
evidence.evidenceText: 비사용 증명서 (Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE)

evidence.claim: The product inspection standard applies to products produced by ㈜휴켐.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 사양은 ㈜휴켐 (이하 당사라 함)에서 생산되는 제품에 대해 적용한다.

evidence.claim: One inspection lot is formed from the production quantity for one operation by type.
One product is one inspection unit.
Thermal conductivity inspection references ASTM D 5470.
Sample collection follows the ASTM D 5470 measurement method.
evidence.evidenceText: ASTM D 5470 측정 방식의 시료 채취 방법에 따른다.

evidence.claim: The inspection standard states thermal conductivity characteristics of 2.5 W/mk or more.
The inspection sheet instructs notifying the buyer when 4M changes occur.
evidence.evidenceText: IF 4M CHANGED,RLEASE INFORM BUYER THE CHANGED ITEMS.

evidence.claim: The inspection sheet lists supplier name HU-CHEM and description THERMAL PAD.
evidence.evidenceText: Supplier Name HU-CHEM ... Description THERMAL PAD

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is explicitly stated; H&Abyz appears as recipient, not an authority.
Thermal conductivity evidence may conflict: product inspection criteria state 2.5 W/mk or more, while the inspection sheet shows 열전도(W/m.k) 1.5.
OCR/text quality issues are present in English fields, including misspellings such as RLEASE, QUWSTIONS, Masure, and Vaild.
The 2D drawing section is listed but no drawing details are present in the provided source text.
